I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19. The 10:00–11:00 slot is taken by "Project Kick-off" (and there's a One‑on‑One 11:00–11:30), so 10:00 is not available.

Options I can book instead (all 1 hour):
- 09:00–10:00 (morning, before the kick-off)
- 11:30–12:30 (immediately after your one‑on‑one) — soonest after 10:00
- Another time that afternoon (tell me a preferred hour)

Before I create the event, please confirm:
1) Which time you want (pick one of the options above or give a specific time on 2024-05-19). I can default to 11:30–12:30 if you want me to choose.
2) Event title (suggestion: "Follow-up Meeting").
3) Short description (suggestion: "Follow-up to review progress, outstanding action items, and next steps.").
4) Any participants to invite (emails), and location (or leave blank for none).

Tell me your choices and I will schedule it.
